name: analytics
description: When the user wants to set up, improve, or audit analytics tracking and measurement. Also use when the user mentions "set up tracking," "GA4," "Google Analytics," "conversion tracking," "event tracking," "UTM parameters," "tag manager," "GTM," "analytics implementation," "tracking plan," "how do I measure this," "track conversions," "attribution," "Mixpanel," "Segment," "are my events firing," or "analytics isn't working." Use this whenever someone asks how to know if something is working or wan
author: coreyhaines31
summary_zh: 这是一个数据埋点与测量工具，专门帮你搞定数据追踪的搭建、优化与审查。无论你是要配置事件和转化统计，还是排查数据为何没上报，它都能派上用场。
